facts: NIT Kurukshetra (National Institute of Technology) is located at Thanesar, Kurukshetra, Haryana, 136119, India.
Language spoken: Hindi.
Climate: Extremely cold in January-February, mildly cold in October-December, extremely hot in June-August, mildly hot in March-May.
Kurukshetra Junction Railway Station is the nearest railway station to NIT Kurukshetra.
There is no airport at Kurukshetra.
Nearest airports are Delhi and Chandigarh international airports.
Cab, bus, and train facilities are available from Delhi and Chandigarh to Kurukshetra.
NIT Kurukshetra has 11 boys hostels (H1 to H11).
H1 Hostel: 3 sharing rooms, for 1st year students.
H2 Hostel: 3 sharing rooms, for 1st year students.
H3 Hostel: 3 sharing rooms, for 1st year students.
H4 Hostel: 1-2 sharing rooms, for 2nd/3rd year students.
H5 Hostel: 1-2 sharing rooms, for 2nd/3rd year students.
H6 Hostel: 1-2 sharing rooms, for 2nd/3rd year students.
H7 Hostel: 1-2 sharing rooms, for 2nd/3rd year students.
H8 Hostel: Single rooms, for 3rd year students.
H9 Hostel: Single rooms, for 3rd year students.
H10 Hostel (Visvesvaraya Bhawan): 1-2-3 sharing rooms, for 2nd/3rd/4th year students.
H11 Hostel: 2 sharing rooms, for MTech/PhD students.
Mess is located inside the hostel.
1st year boys are allotted 3-sharing rooms in H1, H2, or H3. Senior students get 1 or 2 sharing in H4-H7. 3rd years can get single rooms in H8/H9.
NIT Kurukshetra has 2 girls hostels.
Cauvery Hostel: For 1st and 2nd year girls.
Kalpana Hostel: For 3rd and 4th year girls.
Mess is located inside the hostel.

mess.daily_mandatory: Milk, Sprouts, and Banana served every day
mess.eggs: Eggs served on Monday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, and Sunday

monday.lunch: Rajma, Pulka, Jeera Rice, Dahi, Chapati, Salad, Achaar
monday.dinner: Kadai Paneer, Tandoori/Missi Roti, Mix Dal, Chapati

tuesday.lunch: Kadi Pakoda, Sambhar, Rice, Chapati, Dahi, Salad, Achaar
tuesday.dinner: Missi Roti, Rice, Chana Dal, Ice Cream, Chapati, Salad, Achaar

wednesday.lunch: Arhar Dal, Palak Paneer, Rice, Chapati

thursday.lunch: White Chana Gravy, Moong Dal, Chapati, Salad, Achaar

friday.lunch: Fried Rice, Rajma, Seasonal Veg, Chapati, Salad, Achaar, Thundar

saturday.lunch: Aloo Zeera, Chana/Chole Dal, Fried Rice, Dahi, Chapati, Pagad, Salad, Achaar
saturday.dinner: White Chana Gravy, Musoor Dal, Chapati

sunday.lunch: Veg Biryani, Black Chana Dry, Chapati, Salad, Achaar
sunday.dinner: Paneer Bhurji/Chilli Paneer, Rajma/Masoor, Tawa Roti, Achaar

mess.cuisine: Predominantly North Indian food with Haryanvi touches. Staples include chapati, dal, rice, rajma, paneer dishes, and parathas.

fee_structure.program: B.Tech (same structure applies to B.Arch & Planning)

facts: Jio 4G and Airtel 5G mobile networks work at NIT Kurukshetra.
Hostel rooms have WLAN (wireless LAN) connectivity.
75% attendance is mandatory at NIT Kurukshetra.
Techspardha: Technical fest of NIT Kurukshetra.
Confluence: Cultural fest of NIT Kurukshetra.
Laundry facilities are available with washing machines at NIT Kurukshetra.
No student elections are held at NIT Kurukshetra.
Night canteen available at NIT Kurukshetra.
Maggi Hotspot available at night.
NIT Market available during daytime for essentials.
Juice shop on campus.
Haircut shop on campus.
Grocery shops on campus.
Dominos on campus.
Fruit shop on campus.
Separate boys gym and girls gym.
Free/Unpaid for all students.
Health center available on campus.
Fee is included in the semester fee.
Timings: 9 AM to 7 PM.
Hindi is the primary language spoken in and around NIT Kurukshetra.
Extremely cold in January-February. Mildly cold in October-December. Extremely hot in June-August. Mildly hot in March-May. Kurukshetra experiences extreme seasonal variations.
